---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: assets/references.bib
---

## Journal Articles

1. **[Author(s)]** (202X). [Title]. *[Journal]*, *[Volume]*([Issue]), [pages]. [DOI](#)

2. **[Author(s)]** (202X). [Title]. *[Journal]*, *[Volume]*([Issue]), [pages]. [DOI](#)

---

## Conference Papers

1. **[Author(s)]** (202X). [Title]. *Proceedings of [Conference]*, [pages]. [DOI](#)

---

## Preprints

1. **[Author(s)]** (202X). [Title]. *arXiv*. [Link](#)
